tools.name: get_shape_docs
tools.description: Return the full CodePic shape reference — all element types, their fields, data payloads, and JSON examples. Call this before create_diagram or update_diagram whenever you need to use an unfamiliar shape type or set type-specific data fields (e.g. select options, triangle direction, callout tail). N

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List all available CodePic diagram templates. Use this ONLY when the user has explicitly asked to browse, list, or pick from templates (e.g. "show me templates", "列出模板"). Do NOT call this as a preparatory step when the user just described a diagram they want — in that case go straight to `create_dia

tools.name: create_from_template
tools.description:
Create a new CodePic diagram from a predefined template. Requires API Key authentication. Returns a public view URL and edit URL.

**STRICT USAGE RULE — READ BEFORE CALLING:**
Only call this tool when the user has **explicitly** asked to use a template. Explicit signals include phrases like: "use a

tools.name: create_diagram
tools.description:
Create a custom CodePic hand-drawn style diagram by specifying nodes and edges. Requires API Key authentication. Returns a public view URL.

**THIS IS THE DEFAULT TOOL FOR ANY USER-DESCRIBED DIAGRAM.** Whenever the user describes a diagram they want ("draw an A/B test flowchart", "帮我画一个登录流程", "a sys

tools.name: get_diagram
tools.description: Fetch the current state of an existing CodePic diagram. Returns a compact summary of all elements with their IDs, types, positions, and parent-child relationships. Use this before update_diagram when you need to: add nested children to existing containers, make targeted edits to specific elements, o

tools.name: update_diagram
tools.description:
Update an existing CodePic diagram. You can rename it, replace all nodes/edges, or add/remove individual nodes and edges. Requires API Key authentication.

When responding to the user, present the returned URL as a clickable markdown link (e.g. `[Open in CodePic →](URL)`) so the user can click it di

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "create_from_template" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Create a new CodePic diagram from a predefined template. Requires API Key authentication. Returns a public view URL and edit URL. **STRICT USAGE RULE — READ BEF…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "create_from_template" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Create a new CodePic diagram from a predefined template. Requires API Key authentication. Returns a public view URL and edit URL. **STRICT USAGE RULE — READ BEF…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "create_diagram" is 2130 chars, far longer than this server's median (385). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Create a custom CodePic hand-drawn style diagram by specifying nodes and edges. Requires API Key authentication. Returns a public view URL. **THIS IS THE DEFAUL…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_from_template, create_diagram, update_diagram · Private data: create_from_template, create_diagram, get_diagram, update_diagram · Public sink: create_diagram · Destructive: update_diagram.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_from_template, create_diagram, update_diagram · Private data: create_from_template, create_diagram, get_diagram, update_diagram · Public sink: create_diagram · Destructive: update_diagram

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
